title: Zi Shu
content:
his sword spirit beast is rat.

HE was wearing blue robes and had big sword on his back.

He saw 
Wang Lin
 heavely injured flying over in sky and thought if he were to kill ascendant cultivator he will gain many magic treasures and also some rare techniques. he also thought if he refined ascendant cultivators origin soul and feed it to his sword spirit beast it will incease its strenght greatly, but instead he along with 30 000 demon soldiers were killed by wang lin coldbloodedly.
